tool_input.command:
git add .caliber/ && git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
chore: update Caliber learning state

Auto-generated by Caliber session tracking.

https://claude.ai/code/session_01G5U4Bc1SSdWTeSBbqF3Um9
EOF
)" && git push -u origin claude/update-claude-md-GOKwQ
tool_input.description: Commit and push caliber learning state

tool_input.command:
check() {
  local d="$1"
  local r=$(curl -s "https://cloudflare-dns.com/dns-query?name=${d}&type=A" -H "accept: application/dns-json")
  local has_answer=$(echo "$r" | grep -c '"Answer"')
  if [ "$has_answer" -gt 0 ]; then echo "$d: TAKEN"; else echo "$d: possibly open"; fi
}
for d in \
  sobremesa.com sobremesa.app \
  aperitivo.com aperitivo.app \
  gloaming.com gloaming.app \
  nocturne.com nocturne.app \
  terroir.com terroir.app \

  mistral.menu mistral.app \
  outpost.com outpost.app \
  hideaway.com hideaway.app \
  reverie.com reverie.app \
  wayside.com wayside.app \
  passeggiata.com passeggiata.app \
  landing.menu \
  harbor.menu harborhour.com harborhour.app \
  saltroute.com saltroute.app \
  spiceroute.com spiceroute.app \
  amberroute.com amberroute.app \
  silkroute.com silkroute.app \
  tearoute.com tearoute.app \
  wineroute.com wineroute.app \
  nightroute.com nightroute.app \
  eveningroute.com eveningroute.app \
  goldenroute.com goldenroute.app \
  slowroute.com slowroute.app \
  goldenmile.com goldenmile.app \
  nightport.com nightport.app \
  portlight.com portlight.app \
  lateharbor.com lateharbor.app \
  cinderroute.com cinderroute.app \
  nightcrossing.com nightcrossing.app \
  lastcrossing.com lastcrossing.app \
  slowcrossing.com slowcrossing.app \
  warmcrossing.com warmcrossing.app \
  hourcrossing.com thecrossing.menu \
  twilit.com twilit.app \
  twilight.menu \
  afterglow.menu \
  evensong.com evensong.app \
  vesper.menu vesper.app \
  compass.menu compassbook.com \
  skyline.menu skylinebook.com \
  horizon.menu horizonbook.com; do
  check "$d"
done
